note: Full 8-task Terminal-Bench 2.x sample, measured after the test-grounding + repair-triage improvements. The agent now reads a CONTRACT extracted from each grader's test_outputs.py, and the repair loop triages failures into near-miss / missing-deliverable / hopeless. Baseline (pre-improvement, deepseek-v4-flash) was 6/8 (75.0%).

results.note: Previously FAILED (30 turns, no /app/program.py produced). Now passes in 15 turns — the CONTRACT preamble surfaced /app/program.py + all expected outputs, so the model wrote the deliverable instead of looping on exploration.

Stochastic near-miss: 3/4 tests pass, only test_no_overfull_hboxes fails. This is a constraint-satisfaction search (find synonyms that fit line width AND stay in-family) at the edge of deepseek-chat's ability. Passed once in a targeted run, failed in the full-sample run on a different sub-test. The repair loop correctly classifies it as near-miss and fires, but converging the search is not reliable.
